---
title: "HCC Research — Grants & Key Publications"
subtitle: "Texas 2009–2025"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
filters:
  - timeline
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { background: #f8fafc; font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }
  h1.title   { color: #0f172a; font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: .2rem; }
  p.subtitle { color: #475569; font-size: 1.1rem; margin-top: 0; }

  .timeline {
    --tl-color-line:    #cbd5e1;
    --tl-line-width:    4px;
    --tl-dot-size:      1.05rem;
    --tl-gap:           1.6rem;
    --tl-label-size:    0.85em;
    --tl-content-size:  0.9em;
    --tl-color-card-bg: #ffffff;
    padding: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
  }
  .tl-card {
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
    border-radius: 10px !important;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem !important;
  }

  .legend {
    display: flex; gap: 1.4rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
    align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
    padding: .6rem 1rem; background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    font-size: .82rem; color: #334155;
  }
  .legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
  .pip { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; }
</style>

<div class="legend">
  <strong style="color:#0f172a;margin-right:.3rem">Key:</strong>
  <div class="legend-item"><span class="pip" style="background:#1d4ed8"></span>CPRIT Grant</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><span class="pip" style="background:#b91c1c"></span>Publication (BCM / UTSW / MDA)</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><span class="pip" style="background:#6d28d9"></span>Ramirez Lab (UTHSCSA)</div>
  <div class="legend-item"><span class="pip" style="background:#047857"></span>Milestone</div>
  <div style="margin-left:auto;font-size:.75rem;color:#94a3b8">Source: events.csv</div>
</div>
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd
import math

df = pd.read_csv('events.csv')

def safe(val):
    return '' if (val is None or (isinstance(val, float) and math.isnan(val))) else str(val).strip()

COLOR = {
    'Grant':     '#1d4ed8',
    'Article':   '#b91c1c',
    'Milestone': '#047857',
}
EMOJI = {
    'Grant':     '🏆',
    'Article':   '📄',
    'Milestone': '🎯',
}

def color_for(cat, subcat):
    if cat == 'Article' and subcat == 'Ramirez Lab':
        return '#6d28d9'
    return COLOR.get(cat, '#64748b')

def emoji_for(cat, subcat):
    if cat == 'Article' and subcat == 'Ramirez Lab':
        return '🔬'
    return EMOJI.get(cat, '·')

out = ['::: {.timeline .tl-label-badge .tl-card}', '']

for _, row in df.iterrows():
    cat    = safe(row['category'])
    subcat = safe(row['subcategory'])
    year   = int(row['year'])
    title  = safe(row['title'])
    authors = safe(row['authors'])
    journal = safe(row['journal'])
    vol     = safe(row['volume_issue_pages'])
    inst    = safe(row['institution'])
    pmid    = safe(row['pmid'])
    desc    = safe(row['description'])

    col = color_for(cat, subcat)
    emo = emoji_for(cat, subcat)

    out.append(f'::: {{.event data-label="{year}" style="--tl-color-accent: {col}"}}')
    out.append(f'{emo} **{title}**')
    out.append('')

    # Citation line
    cite_parts = []
    if authors:
        cite_parts.append(authors)
    if journal:
        cite_parts.append(journal + (f';{vol}' if vol else ''))
    if pmid:
        cite_parts.append(f'PMID {pmid}')
    if cite_parts:
        out.append('*' + ' · '.join(cite_parts) + '*')
        out.append('')

    if inst:
        out.append(f'*{inst}*')
        out.append('')

    if desc:
        out.append(desc)
        out.append('')

    out.append(':::')
    out.append('')

out.append(':::')
print('\n'.join(out))
```
